name: Eggroll Filling #2 (Dxdg05a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Add the finely chopped onion to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until softened.
4. Increase the heat to high and add the ground pork to the skillet. Break up any large clumps with a spatula and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
6. Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
7. Turn off the heat and let the filling cool for a few minutes before using it in your eggrolls.
